title: [Goal] Side Panel: Documentation & Inspector
description:
## Description

Push-style side panel with two modes: (1) Documentation — renders README.md and current route source code, (2) Inspector — React component fiber inspector with mouse-select mode. Panel pushes page content instead of overlaying.

## Tasks

- [x] **#g012#t01**: Create fiberWalker.js — framework-agnostic React fiber tree inspector utility in packages/core/src/inspector/
- [x] **#g012#t02**: Side panel store + push layout CSS + SidePanel shell
- [x] **#g012#t03**: CoreUIBar integration: doc + inspector trigger buttons + keyboard shortcuts
- [x] **#g012#t04**: Docs server handler + DocPanel with markdown rendering
- [x] **#g012#t05**: Fiber walker + mouse mode + InspectorPanel
- [x] **#g012#t06**: Config update + server plugin wiring
- [x] **#g012#t07**: Add source code display to InspectorPanel with line highlighting and auto-scroll
- [x] **#g012#t08**: Side panel floating with mode collar + box shadows
- [x] **#g012#t09**: Fix icon fill on dark trigger buttons (dark theme fallbacks)
- [x] **#g012#t10**: Inspector shows source code of selected component with line highlight
- [x] **#g012#t11**: Fix Octicon SVG fill to inherit currentColor
- [x] **#g012#t12**: Fix inspector source: use file-name matching instead of _debugSource (React 19 compat)
- [x] **#g012#t13**: Fix inspector source: resolve page file from URL route instead of component name matching
- [x] **#g012#t14**: Fix page file resolution: strip base path by progressive segment matching
- [x] **#g012#t15**: Remove tab bar, full-height source code, resizable drag handle
- [x] **#g012#t16**: Add See on GitHub link to inspector source code header
- [x] **#g012#t17**: Simplify inspector: remove chain/owner, persistent highlight, auto-start
- [x] **#g012#t18**: Syntax highlighting via shiki + GitHub link inferred from git remote
- [x] **#g012#t19**: Find component line number from props matching in source code, highlight with shiki
- [x] **#g012#t20**: Fix fiber walker to detect forwardRef/memo components (find lowest-level component)

---
